channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Gate blocked, 18th June
item.description:
Gate bloxk and fence damaged by parties to maintain acces

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Innsworth Lane, Innsworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drain still blocked, 18th June
item.description:
Drain still blocked been almost 2 years and not fixed Road is about to resurfaced so would damage new surface if not repaired and cost more money

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Innsworth Lane, Innsworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other problem, 18th June
item.description:
1 x gully and line amd remove the weed growth around the gully
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 18th June
item.description:
OVERGROWN HEDGE OBSTRUCTING FOOTWAY PLEASE CUT BACK APPROX 8 METRES STANDARD TM ALTERNATIVE FOOTWAY (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 18th June
item.description:
OVERGROWN HEDGE OBSTRUCTING FOOTWAY PLEASE CUT BACK APPROX 4 METRES STANDARD TM ALTERNATIVE FOOTWAY (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -FW6 Potholes problem, 18th June
item.description:
2hr emergency Make safe with barriers Road closure TM required with fway closure (FW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Spinning cone not working on both sides of road, 18th June
item.description:
Spinning cone not working on both sides of road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 58, Hucclecote Road, Hucclecote, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Green or amber traffic light is not working

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 18th June
item.description:
